name: Echo
affiliation: Lattice — controlled operative, not a willing member
visualHook: Repeating motion tells — same step twice, laugh twice — subtle wrongness. Restraint harness under clothes; Lattice failsafe glow at neck or wrist.
roleInPlot: Episode 5: villain drawn from Glitch's intel. Elias refuses the finishing blow; Echo escapes — proving mercy has a bill. Elias notices control, not cruelty.
outcome: Escape (per brief). Sets moral template: some enemies are prisoners. May recur as tragedy, not moustache villain.
continuityNote: Echo must read as controlled — Solace's observation must be fair on rewatch.
